title: Citrusy Creamy Braised Fish Stir-fry
description: A brunch-mood Filipino dish featuring citrusy, creamy flavors with a touch of sichuan pepper for added depth and heat, suitable for pescatarian diets.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and ginger, sauté for 2 minutes.
Add chicken broth, soy sauce, fish sauce, sichuan peppercorns, and 4 cups of water to the pan. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for about 10 minutes or until slightly reduced. Add cornstarch dissolved in a little water and stir well until thickened.
Place breaded fish fillets into the sauce and gently cook on each side until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Stir occasionally to ensure even cooking, adding more water if needed to prevent sticking. Adjust seasoning with additional soy sauce or fish sauce as desired.
Serve hot with garnished with extra fish sauce for a touch of umami and added flavor.
